narrative:
Spencerville Local Sd (Allen) school district has 3,279 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -13.8% D−R vs -45.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
